title: Customer Service Executive
description:
The Customer Service Executive is responsible for providing exceptional service and support to assigned key accounts. The role involves managing client inquiries, troubleshooting issues, and ensuring that clients receive the highest level of satisfaction with the company’s products and services. The Customer Service Executive serves as the primary liaison between the client and internal departments, helping to maintain strong, long-term relationships.

Job Responsibilities:

·  Client Support and Relationship Management:

o   Act as the main point of contact for key accounts, handling their day-to-day inquiries and requests.

o   Provide prompt and accurate responses to client queries regarding products, services, and order status.

o   Build and maintain strong, positive relationships with key clients to ensure their satisfaction.

·  Order Management and Coordination:

o   Manage and process client orders, ensuring accuracy and timely delivery.

o   Coordinate with internal teams (e.g., sales, logistics, production) to fulfill customer requirements.

o   Monitor the progress of orders, resolving any issues that may arise.

·  Issue Resolution:

o   Address client complaints or concerns in a timely and effective manner, ensuring issues are resolved to the client’s satisfaction.

o   Proactively identify potential issues and take action to mitigate them before they impact the customer experience.

·  Client Feedback and Reporting:

o   Gather and report on client feedback, ensuring it is communicated to relevant internal teams for continuous improvement.

o   Prepare regular reports on account activity, client satisfaction, and key performance indicators (KPIs).

·   Collaboration and Cross-Department Communication:

o   Work closely with the sales and account management teams to ensure alignment on client strategies.

o   Collaborate with other departments (e.g., finance, logistics, product development) to resolve client-related issues.

Job Requirements:

o   Diploma in Business Management or a related field.

o   Proven experience in customer service and account management.

o   Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

o   Excellent problem-solving and conflict-resolution abilities.

o  Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

o  Strong multitasking skills and the ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment.

o  High level of professionalism and integrity.

postedCompany.description:
Hong Food Enterprise Pte Ltd is a well-established frozen seafood & product supplier to Singapore Hotels, Resorts and Restaurant-Chains. Founded since 1980, the HONGFOOD brand had built a reputation of quality & trustworthiness recognized by our partners, customers & Chefs of the F&B industries. Our seafood is sea-catch or freshly harvested from our all-natural certified farms. Our food factories are Internationally certified, meeting International food safety (HACCP), and product quality control standards (ISO 9001), including product traceability from farm to factory to distribution centers.


Our purpose: Provide excellent, ready-to-cook protein sources to satisfy the palettes that crave healthy and delicious seafood. We are spreading our fins and claws to share our treasure trove from the seas. We want everyone to have their seafood and eat it. Huge opportunities await as we swim further and deeper into the minds of seafood lovers, and we want to change the future of eating.


A strong advocate of sustainability, we practice responsible seafood culture. Having peace of mind and enjoying what’s on your plate is our promise. Our work is far from done. No effort is too small to make ourselves even better.


Come join in our mission.
postedCompany.name: HONG FOOD ENTERPRISE PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
